scripts.check: uv run ruff check mrag tests scripts && uv run python -m pytest tests/test_picretrieve_graph.py PicRetrieve/tests/test_retrieval.py
scripts.arch:export:json: cd architecture/likec4 && likec4 export json --project mmrag --pretty -o ../../docs/likec4/model.json
scripts.arch:export:png: cd architecture/likec4 && rm -rf ../../docs/likec4/png && likec4 export png --project mmrag --flat -o ../../docs/likec4/png
